record.field: product_taxe = record.taxes_id.filtered(lambda t: t.tax_group_id.name != 'Deposit') supplier_taxe = record.supplier_taxes_id.filtered(lambda t: t.tax_group_id.name != 'Deposit') if record.x_deposit_product_1: product_taxe += record.x_deposit_product_1.taxes_id supplier_taxe += record.x_deposit_product_1.supplier_taxes_id record['taxes_id'] = [(6, 0, (product_taxe).ids)] record['supplier_taxes_id'] = [(6, 0, (supplier_taxe).ids)]
